name: Ginger Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine sugar and water.
2. Bring to boiling, stirring to dissolve sugar.
3. Add cranberries and return to boiling.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, over medium-high heat for 4-5 minutes or until the cranberry skins pop, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat, stir in lemon juice and pickled ginger (or grated ginger).
6. Cover and chill until ready to serve (up to 1 week). Makes 8 servings of 1/4 cup each.
